series_metadata.series_description: Record consists of temporary instruction permit and identification card applications (BMV 2002) and accompanying paper work as required by O.R.C. 4507.05 4507.11 4506.06.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Microform: Applications issued a temporary instruction permit prior implementation of Print On Demand (POD) applications shall be retained a period of seven (7) years ; Electronic: At time application is made a temporary instruction permit information, including signatures, shall be captured and stored electronically. Electronic files shall be retained a period of eight (8) years ; Paper: paper records that are not microfilmed
retention_rules.disposition_method: Microform: Shred ; Electronic: Erase ; Paper: Shred
